# Caregos

Caregos is an independent public-data utility for comparing US nursing homes with CMS ratings, staffing, inspection, and enforcement data.

Important pages:

- https://caregos.com/
- https://caregos.com/listings.html
- https://caregos.com/compare.html
- https://caregos.com/enforcement.html
- https://caregos.com/methodology.html
- https://caregos.com/blog/
- https://caregos.com/blog/five-star-rating/

Data and trust:

- CMS data source notes appear on data blocks.
- Enforcement language is neutral and source-based.
- Correction requests are handled at https://caregos.com/corrections.html.
